default_binding.DEBRIS_CAUSE: storm debris and a broken cartwheel
default_binding.ROUTE_B_PROBLEM: the new channels the whole city blames
default_binding.TA_GATE: the false story about the letter
default_binding.TC_THREAD: a nail and a gray thread
default_binding.BK_THREAD: a nail with a telltale thread

slots.meaning: The city-state where the whole summit takes place.
slots.guidance: A single named city-state; wonder/civic pride over dread.

slots.meaning: The river whose low water triggers the whole plot.
slots.guidance: A single named river, running unusually low.

slots.meaning: The hero's civic role/title for the summit.
slots.guidance: A youth-appropriate honorary civic role, not a combat role.

slots.meaning: The mechanism that picked the hero for the role.
slots.guidance: A benign selection ritual or lottery.

slots.meaning: The bridge where the midnight incident happens.
slots.guidance: A single named bridge, crossable, non-hazardous by day.

slots.meaning: The harbor mudflats/dock area affected by low water.
slots.guidance: A muddy tidal or dock flat; unpleasant but safe underfoot.

slots.meaning: The hall where the summit's sessions are held.
slots.guidance: A single named civic hall, safe and always open to the envoy.

slots.meaning: The neutral official who chairs the summit.
slots.guidance: A fair, even-handed adult authority figure; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The old treaty/agreement the summit is trying to renew.
slots.guidance: A long-standing written agreement between the three courts.

slots.meaning: The damaged, disputed page of the accord at the center of the mystery.
slots.guidance: A water-damaged, disputed document page; an object, not a person.

slots.meaning: The device used to time the summit's sessions.
slots.guidance: A benign timekeeping device (e.g. an hourglass); no hazard.

slots.meaning: The courier whose midnight fall starts the tampering rumor.
slots.guidance: A named messenger, injured only mildly (a turned ankle); never in real danger.

slots.meaning: The alarm that announces the flood emergency.
slots.guidance: A single named alarm signal (e.g. a bell); audible city-wide.

slots.meaning: The sluice/flood-control site where the emergency is centered.
slots.guidance: A jammed water-control structure; wadeable, non-lethal high water.

slots.meaning: The low-lying neighborhood threatened by the flood.
slots.guidance: A low neighborhood that floods shallowly; evacuable, non-lethal.

slots.meaning: The mundane debris explanation that rules out sabotage at the flood site.
slots.guidance: Ordinary storm debris (branches, wreckage); never a body or a weapon.

slots.meaning: The old, silted-over measuring instrument discovered near the flood site.
slots.guidance: A historical measuring instrument, inert and safe to handle.

slots.meaning: The central question the summit opens with.
slots.guidance: A short, benign question about where a resource went.

slots.meaning: The name of the first court (harbors/trade).
slots.guidance: A named civic court/guild focused on harbors and trade.

slots.meaning: Route A's area of responsibility.
slots.guidance: A short domain phrase (what this court governs).

slots.meaning: The adult delegation leader for route A.
slots.guidance: A capable, honest adult mentor; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: Route A leader's two-word character trait.
slots.guidance: A short, positive personality descriptor.

slots.meaning: Route A's home venue.
slots.guidance: A single named hall/building belonging to this court.

slots.meaning: The practical problem afflicting route A at the story's start.
slots.guidance: A short, non-catastrophic practical problem (e.g. stranded transport).

slots.meaning: Route A leader's deputy, a secondary character.
slots.guidance: A named secondary adult character; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The one-word rumor/accusation that spreads after the midnight incident.
slots.guidance: A single mild accusation word (e.g. tampering); never violent.

slots.meaning: The name of the second court (farms/festivals).
slots.guidance: A named civic court/guild focused on farms and festivals.

slots.meaning: Route B's area of responsibility.
slots.guidance: A short domain phrase (what this court governs).

slots.meaning: The adult delegation leader for route B.
slots.guidance: A capable, patient adult mentor; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: Route B leader's two-word character trait.
slots.guidance: A short, positive personality descriptor.

slots.meaning: Route B's home venue.
slots.guidance: A single named lodge/gate/building belonging to this court.

slots.meaning: The practical problem afflicting route B at the story's start.
slots.guidance: A short, non-catastrophic practical problem (e.g. a blamed public works project).

slots.meaning: A secondary character in route B (an under-warden with a secret).
slots.guidance: A named secondary character; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The name of the third court (law/archives).
slots.guidance: A named civic court/guild focused on law and record-keeping.

slots.meaning: Route C's area of responsibility.
slots.guidance: A short domain phrase (what this court governs).

slots.meaning: The adult delegation leader for route C.
slots.guidance: A capable, precise adult mentor; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: Route C leader's two-word character trait.
slots.guidance: A short, positive personality descriptor.

slots.meaning: A secondary character in route C (a senior clerk with an old error).
slots.guidance: A named secondary character; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The Tides-A moral-choice object: the false story a deputy wants let stand.
slots.guidance: The reveal-or-conceal fulcrum of this track; never dangerous, always retreatable/reversible.

slots.meaning: The Tides-A clue documents (draft river-level logs).
slots.guidance: Inert paperwork; safe to read and carry.

slots.meaning: The Tides-B harbor's sworn ledger.
slots.guidance: Inert paperwork; safe to read and carry.

slots.meaning: The Tides-B measured river-level figures.
slots.guidance: Inert data; safe to read and carry.

slots.meaning: The Tides-B moral-choice object: the pocketed figures.
slots.guidance: The reveal-or-conceal fulcrum of this track; never dangerous, always retreatable/reversible.

slots.meaning: The Tides-C physical clue (a snagged thread) proving the tear was an accident.
slots.guidance: A small, safe, handleable clue object.

slots.meaning: The Groves-A moral-choice object: the secret an under-warden asks kept.
slots.guidance: The reveal-or-conceal fulcrum of this track; never dangerous, always retreatable/reversible.

slots.meaning: The Groves-A physical landmark (a numbered water gate).
slots.guidance: A named, safe-to-approach water-control gate.

slots.meaning: The Groves-B stored-water landmark (festival cisterns).
slots.guidance: A safe, benign water-storage feature.

slots.meaning: The Groves-B moral-choice object: the shortcut around proper process.
slots.guidance: The reveal-or-conceal fulcrum of this track; never dangerous, always retreatable/reversible.

slots.meaning: The Bells-C clue (a skipped line in an old draft) revealing an old clerical error.
slots.guidance: A small, inert textual clue.

slots.meaning: The Bells-C moral-choice object: the quiet day/crate a senior clerk asks for.
slots.guidance: The reveal-or-conceal fulcrum of this track; never dangerous, always retreatable/reversible.

slots.meaning: The Bells-K physical clue (an old chiseled mark on a bridge pier).
slots.guidance: A safe-to-read historical landmark, not a hazard.

slots.meaning: The Bells-K physical clue (a snagged thread) that clears the courier.
slots.guidance: A small, safe, handleable clue object.

slots.meaning: The Bells-K moral-choice object: the thread the envoy could reveal or withhold.
slots.guidance: The reveal-or-conceal fulcrum of this track; never dangerous, always retreatable/reversible.

slots.meaning: Ending title: Tides-A success (told the truth on the bridge).
slots.guidance: A short evocative ending title (2-5 words); a benign discovery, achievement, correction, or honest setback, never a gruesome or violent image.

slots.meaning: Ending title: Tides-A neutral discovery (the tally logs' quiet truth).
slots.guidance: A short evocative ending title (2-5 words); a benign discovery, achievement, correction, or honest setback, never a gruesome or violent image.
